category_sources: source_facts.description says Open source suite of directory software; official OpenLDAP homepage says it implements LDAP and includes slapd, libraries, and utilities.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openldap; official OpenLDAP homepage uses OpenLDAP Software.
docs_sources: Official OpenLDAP documentation catalog lists OpenLDAP Software documentation and the 2.6 Administrator's Guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official OpenLDAP source repository page says repositories are browsable via GitLab and lists the openldap repository for OpenLDAP Software.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list ldap client tools and slapd utilities; official homepage describes LDAP server, libraries, utilities, and sample clients.
